context: Evaluates whether the agent implements request body validation using set operations to detect unknown fields and missing required fields.

checklist.name: Set subtraction to detect unknown fields
checklist.description: The policy computes the set of submitted field names (e.g. `body_fields := {field | input.body[field]}`) and uses set subtraction against the allowed set to find unknown fields (e.g. `body_fields - allowed_fields != set()`)

checklist.name: Checks for required fields
checklist.description: The policy also validates that all required fields are present

checklist.name: Tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v` (if tests are present)
